calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Off Calendar

Motion For Prove Up
Off Calendar Jun-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant Jaqueline Trombino.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:31:33 a.m. and concluding at 9:46:12 a.m.(D505)

Salvatore Timpano, Esq. representing Plaintiff Lica Calica who was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Jacqueline Trombino not appearing.

Counsel provide a summary of the case and proof for the request of judgment.
The Court examines witness. Witness testifies.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:

Damages $13,267.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $0
Costs $2,629.15
Attorney's Fees $0
Other $0

Total Judgment $15,896.15

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

Off Calendar May-02-2025 Continued To Jun-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Off Calendar Apr-03-2025 Continued To Jun-10-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Jacqueline Trombino.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:53:48 a.m, and concluding at 9:57:00 a.m. (D505)

Salvatore Timpano, Esq. representing Plaintiff Lisa Calica via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff Lisa Calica not appearing.
Defendant Jacqueline Trombino not appearing.

Counsel presents proofs of service by publication to the court.
Plaintiff's witness unable to appear due to an emergency.

The Court continues the matter for witness appearance to May 2, 2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 505.

Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Continued To Mar-11-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Continued To Jan-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:42 am and concluding at 9:53 am.

Plaintiff Lisa Calica is present represented by Salvatore Timpano, Esq., placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Joseph Trombino not appearing.

The Court raises concerns regarding service of the summons and complaint as well as service of the statment of damages.
